subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Leaf! Rejoice thou, inasmuch as the Divine Lote-Tree maketh mention of thee from the right of the luminous Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه العلیا ان افرحی بما تذکرک سدره المنتهی عن یمین البقعه النورآء
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
